channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-6933] conf-sanity test_82b fail with 'lfs getstripe -c f82b.conf-sanity wrong: found 1, expected 2'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Amir Shehata <amir.shehata@intel.com>

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,flock shadow-17vm8@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
Lustre: Mounted lustre-client
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: eval /usr/sbin/lctl get_param n lov.lustre-clilov*.target_obd | awk 'BEGIN

{c = 0} /ACTIVE/{c += 1} END {printf "%d", c}'
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: eval /usr/sbin/lctl get_param n lov.lustre-clilov*.target_obd | awk 'BEGIN {c = 0}

/ACTIVE/

{c += 1}

END

{printf "%d", c}

'
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param n lov.lustre*.pools.test_82b 2>/dev/null || echo foo
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param n lov.lustre*.pools.test_82b 2>/dev/null || echo foo
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param n lov.lustre*.pools.test_82b 2>/dev/null || echo foo
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param n lov.lustre*.pools.test_82b 2>/dev/null || echo foo
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param n lov.lustre*.pools.test_82b 2>/dev/null || echo foo
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param n lov.lustre*.pools.test_82b 2>/dev/null || echo foo
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param n lov.lustre*.pools.test_82b| sort -u | tr '\n' ' '
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param n lov.lustre*.pools.test_82b| sort -u | tr '\n' ' '
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark conf-sanity test_82b: @@@@@@ FAIL: \/usr\/bin\/lfs getstripe -c \/mnt\/lustre\/d82b.conf-sanity\/f82b.conf-sanity wrong: found 1, expected 2
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: conf-sanity test_82b: @@@@@@ FAIL: /usr/bin/lfs getstripe -c /mnt/lustre/d82b.conf-sanity/f82b.conf-sanity wrong: found 1, expected 2
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2015-07-30/lustre-reviews-el6_6-x86_64-review-dne-part-1-1_1_1_33713_-70321093384060-183415/conf-sanity.test_82b.debug_log.$(hostname -s).1438305512.log;
dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2015-07-30/lustre-review

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/f41fd068-372b-11e5-84a8-5254006e85c2.
item.summary: conf-sanity test_82b fail with 'lfs getstripe -c f82b.conf-sanity wrong: found 1, expected 2'

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Another failure on master in review-dne-part-1:
2015-12-27 16:55:40 - https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/aa27551c-ace2-11e5-aa1f-5254006e85c2
